title: Tender Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A classic Malaysian dish featuring chicken skewers marinated in a mixture of coconut milk and spices, served with a side of nuka-pickle and coco sugar sauce. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, coco sugar, coriander powder, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the chicken satay hot with a side of nuka-pickle and coco sugar sauce.
To make the coco sugar sauce, mix 1 tablespoon of coco sugar with 2 tablespoons of water in a small bowl.
Drizzle the coco sugar sauce over the chicken satay and nuka-pickle.
